headline: Session 40 made the mobile General Manager decision deck self-validating, preventing stale async decisions from lingering on phones.

items.title: mobile-gm-decision-snapshot-guard
items.evidence: Mobile /api/gm-decision refreshes now validate phase/year/week/team before mutating state and repaint after failed refreshes clear stale pending decisions.

items.title: mobile-overlay-attribute-escaping
items.evidence: Generated mobile overlay data attributes and classes now use quote-safe _escAttr() instead of text-only escaping.

items.title: latest-audit-follow-through
items.evidence: Innovation pack rechecked the Session 40 audit against live code; focused tests and full suite passed with the cache exhausted.

followUps.title: email-forwarding receipt
followUps.evidence: Obtain real received-message proof for football@playfranchisearchitect.com before any SPARKED flip.

blockers.title: launch/SPARKED
blockers.evidence: Launch remains blocked on real email forwarding/copying proof and current live origin/routing evidence.

honestyLedger.title: duplicate-mobile-decision-cache
honestyLedger.evidence: Rejected on evidence because state.mobilePendingDecision and /api/gm-decision already own the source-of-truth path.

honestyLedger.title: missing local closeout helpers
honestyLedger.evidence: render-state-vector, compute-entropy, and append-genome-snapshot are not vendored in this public repo; doctor and board renderers were run locally.

diffStat.suite: npm test 285/285; npm run test:ui 17/17; Pages build/smoke; doctor no items; cache exhausted 0 open
